title: Energizing Umami Portuguese Kielbasa Stir-fry
description: This dish combines the umami richness of kielbasa with a poached flavor profile to create an energizing and flavorful meal that is both Jain-friendly and suitable for quick weekday dinners.
instructions: Heat vegetable oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add kielbasa and cook for about 5 minutes until lightly browned. Remove from the pan and set aside.
In the same pan, add onion and garlic to sauté for about 2-3 minutes until translucent.
Add red bell pepper and zucchini slices, continuing to stir-fry for an additional 4 minutes or until vegetables are tender.
Return kielbasa to the pan with vegetables. Add tapioca sticks and soja sauce to the pan and mix well.
Stir continuously for about 2-3 more minutes until all ingredients are heated through and evenly coated in sauce.
